Plugin.name: VirtualGarage
Plugin.Author: imaximum.tech
Plugin.Description: Store and retrieve vehicles (full state + trunk + mounted decorations/safes) via MySQL/MariaDB.

Commands.Command: Store the vehicle you are looking at
Take a vehicle out of the garage
Delete a vehicle without spawning it
Admin: store looked-at vehicle into a player's garage
Admin: add a vehicle by id to a player's garage
Admin: spawn a vehicle from a player's garage
